images.caption: Adult male, breeding — brilliant yellow with jet-black cap, wings, and tail
Adult male, non-breeding — olive-brown with hints of yellow and dark wings with white wingbars
Adult female, breeding — duller olive-yellow without the black cap
Immature — pale brownish-olive with buffy wingbars, similar in both sexes
Molting adult — patchy mix of breeding yellow and winter olive during seasonal transition
